# PM4Moodle backend -- LOCKED dependencies (generated; do not edit by hand).
#
# Every package below -- direct AND transitive -- is pinned to an exact, tested
# version, so that every install (now or years from now, on any machine)
# produces the same known-good environment. This is the list verified to run
# the backend and serve data to the frontend.
#
# Requires Python 3.11-3.14 (3.12 recommended).
#
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# To regenerate after editing requirements.in:
#   1. (fresh venv on a supported Python)  pip install -r requirements.in
#   2. pip freeze > requirements.txt
#   3. re-add the "--only-binary" line below to the top of the new file
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
#
# The --only-binary line forces the compiled packages to install from prebuilt
# wheels only. On an unsupported Python this makes the install FAIL LOUDLY with
# a clear message instead of silently building a broken C extension -- the
# broken build is what produces errors like:
#   ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'rpds.rpds'
#   ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'numpy._core._multiarray_umath'
# If the install fails on this line, your Python version is unsupported: use a
# supported version (above) rather than deleting this line.
--only-binary=numpy,scipy,cvxopt,lxml,pandas,matplotlib,pillow,contourpy,kiwisolver,rpds-py,greenlet
